title: crepis polycephala
intro: Crepis polycephala, also known as many-headed hawk's beard, is a perennial plant species belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and inflammation, due to its anti-inflammatory and antipyretic effects. The health benefits of Crepis polycephala include its ability to reduce oxidative stress, improve digestion, and support immune function. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in herbal medicine to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health conditions.
